name: @ironforge/workflow-wait-for-cloudfront
description: Workflow task Lambda — wait-for-cloudfront. Single-shot polling Lambda invoked in an SFN Wait→Choice→Task loop (per PR-C.7 / docs/state-machine.md § Polling-loop topology). Calls cloudfront:GetDistribution; returns PollResult.in_progress with carry-forward pollState until Status === "Deployed" or the 20-minute elapsed budget exhausts.
